stake.announcementBanner: System upgrade completed. Shadow Layer V2 is now live.

items.title: RobotX Shadow Layer V2 is Live
items.summary: We are thrilled to announce that the V2 upgrade is complete. This update brings massive gas optimizations...
items.body: We are thrilled to announce that the V2 upgrade is complete. This update brings massive gas optimizations and the new 10-level referral community tracking directly on-chain. Stake now to experience the speed.

items.title: Adjustment on Daily Yield Rates
items.summary: To ensure long-term sustainability of the ecosystem, the 90-day pool yield will be adjusted...
items.body: To ensure long-term sustainability of the RobotX ecosystem, the 90-day staking pool yield will be adjusted from 0.8% to 0.73% starting next month.

mine.marquee: Welcome to RobotX Shadow Layer! Start staking RX today to earn daily yields and build your 10-level network.
